title: Remote actor resolution and remote_accounts cache
description: Implement the pipeline to resolve an ActivityPub actor URI or acct handle to a remote_accounts row: WebFinger lookup (for acct handles) → fetch actor document → parse → upsert into remote_accounts. Cache aggressively; invalidate on signature verification failure. Handle resolution failures gracefully (store failed_at, fail_count).
design: Resolution steps: 1) If URI, fetch directly. 2) If acct, WebFinger then fetch actor URI. Cache in remote_accounts. Re-fetch if last_fetched_at > 24h or on signature failure. Parse domain from actor_uri for the domain field. shared_inbox_url from endpoints.sharedInbox.
acceptance_criteria: Given 'gargron@mastodon.social', can resolve to actor URI then fetch and store actor document; remote_accounts row has correct public_key_pem, inbox_url, shared_inbox_url; resolution failure increments fetch_fail_count and sets fetched_failed_at; cached actors are reused without re-fetching within a reasonable TTL
